meta.purpose: Incremental official-source audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press Lot71-75. This batch records a conservative search pass only; database.json and research-candidates.json are intentionally unchanged because no additional source-linked historical rows were confirmed to promotion standard in this pass.
sourcePriority: Official or high-trust result pages/PDFs only

preflight.duplicateBatchSearch: No open PR was found before this run. Main data/database.json contains Lot71-75 roster skeleton rows with empty histories; no existing Lot71-75 audit batch was found in main by repository search before this branch.

databaseUpdate.reason: No confirmed historical rows beyond the existing roster skeleton met the source-linking and identity standard in this small batch. The canonical DB was not rewritten.

candidateUpdate.reason: Search results did not produce useful but ambiguous athlete-history candidates worth preserving; no uncertain achievement was inferred.

sourceAudit.label: Repository main data/database.json
sourceAudit.usedFor: Confirmed that Lot71-75 roster skeleton rows exist and that histories are empty before this batch.

sourceAudit.label: GitHub open PR search
sourceAudit.usedFor: Checked that no open PR needed merging or conflict review before creating this safe audit branch.

sourceAudit.label: Web search: official/high-trust name sweeps
sourceAudit.usedFor: No reliable confirmed row was found for Lot71-75 through Japanese and romanized name-based high-trust search strings in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: HPA official source family
sourceAudit.usedFor: Maintained source priority for Hokkaido official PDFs. No additional Lot71-75 historical rows were promoted from HPA in this pass.

notes: No achievements, records, placements, or totals were invented or inferred.
Because no candidate-quality ambiguous results were found, data/research-candidates.json was left unchanged.
A4 print layout and v5.9.6_LOCK files were not modified.
A future pass should continue Lot71-75 by directly extracting relevant HPA/JPA PDF rows if PDF text access is available, then promote only rows with exact name and identity support.
